goal: curated runtime for first real KCalc GUI on Android/Graphene without full desktop stack
shipAssets: kcalc current locale plus fallback translations
breeze-icons minimal subset for KCalc/KF6 actions
minimal fonts unless Android font broker is ready
bridgeRequired: minimal D-Bus/session broker for required Qt/KF6 probes
stubNoopInitial: org.freedesktop.Notifications unless KCalc actually needs notifications
file portal for KCalc initial launch
omitInitial: openssl networking stack unless a loaded library requires it
full dbus-daemon package as system/session service
decisionRules: Add a package to shipRequired only when ELF loading or Qt plugin loading proves it is required in-process.
Add a service to bridgeRequired when it represents Android/OS/device behavior or cross-app policy.
Do not install recursive Arch closure as one runtime module.
Prefer no-op stubs for optional desktop services during KCalc first GUI milestone.
Ship libdbus-1 when Qt/KF6 links it, but bridge the D-Bus session/service behavior into Android.
Ship or shim libEGL/libOpenGL/libGLX sonames for Qt ABI resolution, but do not bring Mesa, KWin, or a desktop compositor for the KCalc milestone.
Ship systemd-libs only as ELF libraries when linked by Qt/KF6; do not run systemd user/session services.
